H3100.derivation: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H410 (אֵל); Jehovah (is his) God;
H3100.strongs_def: Joel, the name of twelve Israelites

H3101.derivation: or יֹאָשׁ; (2 Chronicles 24:1), a form of H3060 (יְהוֹאָשׁ);
H3101.strongs_def: Joash, the name of six Israelites

H3102.derivation: perhaps a form of H3103 (יוֹבָב), but more probably by erroneous transcription for H3437 (יָשׁוּב);

H3103.strongs_def: Jobab, the name of two Israelites and of three foreigners

H3104.strongs_def: the blast of a horn (from its continuous sound); specifically, the signal of the silver trumpets; hence, the instrument itself and the festival thus introduced

H3107.strongs_def: Jozabad, the name of ten Israelites

H3109.derivation: probably from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and a variation of H2421 (חָיָה); Jehovah-revived;
H3109.strongs_def: Jocha, the name of two Israelites

H3110.strongs_def: Jochanan, the name of nine Israelites

H3111.strongs_def: Jojada, the name of two Israelites

H3114.strongs_def: Jojarib, the name of four Israelites

H3115.derivation: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) contracted and H3513 (כָּבַד); Jehovah-gloried;

H3117.derivation: from an unused root meaning to be hot;
H3117.strongs_def: a day (as the warm hours), whether literal (from sunrise to sunset, or from one sunset to the next), or figurative (a space of time defined by an associated term), (often used adverb)
H3117.kjv_def: age, [phrase] always, [phrase] chronicals, continually(-ance), daily, ((birth-), each, to) day, (now a, two) days (agone), [phrase] elder, [idiom] end, [phrase] evening, [phrase] (for) ever(-lasting, -more), [idiom] full, life, as (so) long as (... live), (even) now, [phrase] old, [phrase] outlived, [phrase] perpetually, presently, [phrase] remaineth, [idiom] required, season, [idiom] since, space, then, (process of) time, [phrase] as at other times, [phrase] in trouble, weather, (as) when, (a, the, within a) while (that), [idiom] whole ([phrase] age), (full) year(-ly), [phrase] younger.
H3117.usage: time(64x), daily(44x), ever(18x), year(14x), continually(10x), when(10x), as(10x), while(8x), full(8x), always(4x), whole(4x), alway(4x)

H3120.derivation: probably from the same as H3196 (יַיִן); effervescing (i.e. hot and active);
H3120.strongs_def: Javan, the name of a son of Joktan, and of the race (Ionians, i.e. Greeks) descended from him, with their territory; also of a place in Arabia
H3120.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H3122.strongs_def: Jonadab, the name of an Israelite and of a Rechabite

H3123.derivation: probably from the same as H3196 (יַיִן);
H3123.strongs_def: a dove (apparently from the warmth of their mating)

H3125.strongs_def: a Jevanite, or descendant of Javan

H3126.strongs_def: a sucker; hence, a twig (of a tree felled and sprouting)

H3128.derivation: from H3123 (יוֹנָה) and H482 (אֵלֶם) and the plural of H7350 (רָחוֹק);
H3128.strongs_def: dove of (the) silence (i.e. dumb Israel) of (i.e. among) distances (i.e. strangers); the title of a ditty (used for a name of its melody)

H3129.strongs_def: Jonathan, the name of ten Israelites

H3130.derivation: future of H3254 (יָסַף); let him add (or perhaps simply active participle adding);
H3130.strongs_def: Joseph, the name of seven Israelites

H3131.derivation: from active participle of H3254 (יָסַף) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah (is) adding;

H3132.derivation: perhaps feminine active participle of H3276 (יַעַל); furthermore;

H3133.derivation: apparently the active participle of H3259 (יָעַד); appointer;

H3134.derivation: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H5828 (עֵזֶר); Jehovah (is his) help;

H3135.strongs_def: Joash, the name of two Israelites

H3138.strongs_def: sprinkling; hence, a sprinkling (or autumnal showers)

H3141.strongs_def: Joram, the name of three Israelites and one Syrian

H3142.derivation: from H7725 (שׁוּב) and H2617 (חֵסֵד); kindness will be returned;

H3143.derivation: from H3427 (יָשַׁב) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jehovah will cause to dwell;

H3147.derivation: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H8535 (תָּם); Jehovah (is) perfect;
H3147.strongs_def: Jotham, the name of three Israelites

H3148.strongs_def: properly, redundant; hence, over and above, as adjective, noun, adverb or conjunction
H3148.usage: more(3x), better(1x), over(1x), profit(1x), moreover(1x), further(1x)

H3149.derivation: from an unused root (meaning to sprinkle) and H410 (אֵל); sprinkled of God;

H3150.derivation: from the same as the first part of H3149 (יְזַוְאֵל) and H3050 (יָהּ); sprinkled of Jah;

H3151.derivation: from the same as H2123 (זִיז); he will make prominent;

H3152.derivation: perhaps from an unused root (meaning to draw up); he will draw out;

H3154.derivation: from an unused root mean to ooze;
H3154.strongs_def: sweat, i.e. (by implication) a sweating dress

H3155.strongs_def: a Jizrach (i.e. Ezrachite or Zarchite) or descendant of Zerach

H3156.derivation: from H2224 (זָרַח) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah will shine;
H3156.strongs_def: Jizrachjah, the name of two Israelites

H3157.derivation: from H2232 (זָרַע) and H410 (אֵל); God will sow;
H3157.strongs_def: Jizreel, the name of two places in Palestine and of two Israelites
H3157.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H3158.strongs_def: a Jizreelite or native of Jizreel

H3162.kjv_def: alike, at all (once), both, likewise, only, (al-) together, withal.

H3163.derivation: from H3162 (יַחַד) with pronominal suffix; his unity, i.e. (adverb) together;

H3164.derivation: from H3162 (יַחַד) and H410 (אֵל); unity of God;

H3165.derivation: from H3162 (יַחַד) and H3050 (יָהּ); unity of Jah;
H3165.strongs_def: Jechdijah, the name of two Israelites

H3166.derivation: from H2372 (חָזָה) and H410 (אֵל); beheld of God;
H3166.strongs_def: Jachaziel, the name of five Israelites

H3167.derivation: from H2372 (חָזָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah will behold;

H3168.derivation: from H2388 (חָזַק) and H410 (אֵל); God will strengthen;
H3168.strongs_def: Jechezkel, the name of two Israelites

H3169.derivation: or יְחִזְקִיָּהוּ; from H3388 (יְרוּשָׁא) and H3050 (יָהּ); strengthened of Jah;
H3169.strongs_def: Jechizkijah, the name of five Israelites

H3170.derivation: from the same as H2386 (חֲזִיר); perhaps protection;

H3171.derivation: or (2 Chronicles 29:14) יְחַוְאֵל; from H2421 (חָיָה) and H410 (אֵל); God will live;
H3171.strongs_def: Jechiel (or Jechavel), the name of eight Israelites

H3172.strongs_def: a Jechielite or descendant of Jechiel

H3173.strongs_def: properly, united, i.e. sole; by implication, beloved; also lonely; (feminine) the life (as not to be replaced)

H3174.derivation: from H2421 (חָיָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah will live;

H3176.strongs_def: to wait; by implication, to be patient, hope
H3176.kjv_def: (cause to, have, make to) hope, be pained, stay, tarry, trust, wait.
H3176.usage: hope(22x), wait(12x), tarry(3x), trust(2x), variant(2x), stayed(1x)

H3177.derivation: from H3176 (יָחַל) and H410 (אֵל); expectant of God;

H3178.strongs_def: a Jachleelite or descendant of Jachleel

H3179.strongs_def: probably to be hot; figuratively, to conceive
H3179.kjv_def: get heat, be hot, conceive, be warm.

H3182.derivation: from an unused root meaning to take off the shoes;

H3183.derivation: from H2673 (חָצָה)lemma חָעָה ayin, corrected to חָצָה and H410 (אֵל); God will allot;

H3184.strongs_def: a Jachtseelite (collectively) or descendants of Jachtseel

H3185.derivation: from H2673 (חָצָה)lemma חָעָה ayin, corrected to חָצָה and H410 (אֵל); allotted of God;

H3187.derivation: a primitive root; to sprout; used only as denominative from H3188 (יַחַשׂ);
H3187.kjv_def: (number after, number throughout the) genealogy (to be reckoned), be reckoned by genealogies.

H3188.strongs_def: a pedigree or family list (as growing spontaneously)

H3189.strongs_def: Jachath, the name of four Israelites

H3190.strongs_def: to be (causative) make well, literally (sound, beautiful) or figuratively (happy, successful, right)
H3190.kjv_def: be accepted, amend, use aright, benefit, be (make) better, seem best, make cheerful, be comely, [phrase] be content, diligent(-ly), dress, earnestly, find favour, give, be glad, do (be, make) good(-ness), be (make) merry, please ([phrase] well), shew more (kindness), skilfully, [idiom] very small, surely, make sweet, thoroughly, tire, trim, very, be (can, deal, entreat, go, have) well (said, seen).
H3190.usage: well(35x), good(21x), please(14x), merry(5x), amend(4x), better(4x), accepted(2x), diligently(2x)

H3191.strongs_def: {to be (causative) make well, literally (sound, beautiful) or figuratively (happy, successful, right)}

H3193.strongs_def: Jotbathah, a place in the Desert

H3194.strongs_def: Juttah (or Jutah), a place in Palestine

H3195.derivation: probably from the same as H2905 (טוּר); encircled (i.e. inclosed);

H3196.derivation: from an unused root meaning to effervesce;

H3198.strongs_def: to be right (i.e. correct); reciprocal, to argue; causatively, to decide, justify or convict
H3198.kjv_def: appoint, argue, chasten, convince, correct(-ion), daysman, dispute, judge, maintain, plead, reason (together), rebuke, reprove(-r), surely, in any wise.
H3198.usage: reprove(23x), rebuke(12x), correct(3x), plead(3x), reason(2x), chasten(2x), appointed(1x), arguing(1x)

H3199.derivation: from H3559 (כּוּן); he (or it) will establish;
H3199.strongs_def: Jakin, the name of three Israelites and of a temple pillar
